title: Notification No.183/2009-Cus(NT),dt. 23.12.2009
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 183 / 2009-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 23rd December, 2009. 2 Pausa, 1931 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on,- (i) the Commissioner of Customs, JNPT, Nhava Sheva; (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Chennai; and (iii) the Commissioner of Customs, Kandla, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notices pertaining to M/s. Shivalik Impex and others issued vide, F.No. 23/11/2008-DZU/6586 to 6600, dated the 26th December, 2008, by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, New Delhi. [F.No. 437/ 16 /2009-Cus.IV] (Navraj Goyal) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
